transcription.text: Here it comes! Domino's $25 million Nintendo Instant Win Game Card! With a chance to win thousands of free Nintendo prizes! Plus, savings on pizza and Coke Classic! And try Domino's new Twisty brand, free with our unlimited topping medium, just $9.99!

segments.text: Domino's $25 million Nintendo Instant Win Game Card!
With a chance to win thousands of free Nintendo prizes!
Plus, savings on pizza and Coke Classic!
And try Domino's new Twisty brand, free with our unlimited topping medium, just $9.99!
